commands.canonical_script: node -e 'const fs=require("node:fs"),crypto=require("node:crypto"),expected={"ci/release-build.log":"897fa262a51db0844805841456332745592b3e45c8bbd5fb705c10a8c90269c9","docs/build-options.md":"765541869cdc553e6566c905fabf81f1843b4aea4c10e1f4e4989f52f317b2c2","package.json":"50844c248aa736d57768a926544720b56914396bdc7b997f310897b4456aa5ed","test/build-config.test.mjs":"641fcf626c4a06509058e3d4ee49cefcd7166182f75ee26a3ab3c8d87190f6ff","scripts/validate-build-config.mjs":"884155195e0ad532a29ab1dc6122b343fea1bc6f285d54a55edd09653d447c2a"}; for(const [path,digest] of Object.entries(expected)){if(crypto.createHash("sha256").update(fs.readFileSync(path)).digest("hex")!==digest) process.exit(41)}' && [ -f build.config.json ] && node test/build-config.test.mjs
